attempts.summary: Queried OpenSearch dns index for 2026-04-13..2026-04-20 using the sec_analytics dns-tunnel detector; one internal source matched high-volume, high-unique-subdomain, TXT-heavy query pattern.

answer.evidence: 1500 DNS queries to data-corp.io with 1500 unique subdomains and ~73% TXT/NULL type, indicative of tunneling.
